title: Inspect cache headers and edge status
description: Read response Cache-Control/surrogate headers and the CDN HIT/MISS status to explain caching behavior.
body: Use when diagnosing why content is or isn't cached at the edge. Actions: fetch the resource and read Cache-Control, Vary, surrogate keys, and the CDN's cache-status (HIT/MISS/EXPIRED) header; report whether the headers permit shared caching and what fragments the key. Do not infer caching from latency alone — read the status header. This skill is read-only and exposes capability only; it must not purge or deploy without runtime permission. Validation signals include a clear HIT/MISS explanation tied to the headers. Risk boundary: if a private response shows a public HIT, report it as a data-leak finding and recommend escalation.
